what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record that points the attachment identifier att-baed740c to a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
Its target is the URI-like reference 'board://item-4baaab55'.
The filename matches the id field 'att-baed740c'.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme to reference an external board item.
The file is a pure metadata stub with no explanatory or payload content.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter inside a Markdown file.
References another artifact via a URI-style identifier rather than embedding it.
concerns: No body or description explains why this attachment exists.
The referenced board item is not present or summarized in this file.
No author or modification history is recorded.
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub that links a dragnet-development channel attachment to a board item by URI.
questions: What content or state does board://item-4baaab55 represent?
Why does the attachment contain no body or context?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a — no explicit purpose is stated; the file functions only as a metadata pointer to a board item.
intention_signals: It appears intended to record a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for later lookup or context reconstruction.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped link from attachment att-baed740c to board item item-4baaab55 within the dragnet-development channel.
summary_for_embedding: A Markdown attachment metadata file in the dragnet-development channel that references board item item-4baaab55 via a board:// URI and contains only YAML frontmatter.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to register a channel attachment of type board_items pointing at a specific board item for retrieval and correlation.
